message:
test(fcp-e2e): expand Trello compliance E2E with decision receipts and JSONL log validation

- Invoke error responses now include decision receipt IDs via
  stable_object_id() for auditable capability-denial decisions,
  ensuring every rejected invocation carries a deterministic
  receipt that can be traced back to the operation+decision path
- New assert_report_logs_validate() verifies that E2eReport emits
  stable JSONL evidence lines with correct structure: deterministic
  timestamps (epoch zero for reproducibility), proper field presence,
  and parseable JSON on every line
- Imports expanded: ObjectId for receipt IDs, scan_log_jsonl and
  validate_log_entry_value for structured log assertions

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
